title: App Settings - General - About - New update available
scenario: About tab displays App Updates Needed with Update button, version info, and Release Notes link when app update is available via cloud
steps: 1. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app.
2. Tap the hamburger menu (☰) icon to open the navigation drawer.
7. Tap the 'X' button to close the Release Notes page.
expected:
1. The About screen displays: "App Updates Needed" text, an "Update" button, current and available firmware versions, and a link to Release Notes.
2. Tapping the Release Notes link opens the Poly Lens Mobile release notes page showing info about latest and older versions.
3. Tapping the "X" button returns the user to the General section with the About tab expanded.
4. Tapping the "Update" button opens the app store page for Poly Lens.
